name: German Pancake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients together until smooth.
2. Melt 4 tablespoons butter in a 9-1/2 inch pie pan (glass works best).
3. Add the mixture to the pan and bake at 425 degrees in a preheated oven.
4. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Squeeze lemon juice generously over the pancake, then sprinkle powdered sugar over it.
6. Cut into quarters and serve hot. Also good with fresh or canned fruit spooned over the pancake. Enjoy.
